title: InnerScope forms strategic alliance in Ainnova Tech's acquisition of OTCHealth Inc.
summary: InnerScope will receive equity and profit participation in both OTCHealth and Ainnova post-close, with retail operations transitioning to OTCHealth and INND refocusing on hearing-technology R&D.

title: Grand opening of OTCHealthMart.com
summary: Launches an e-commerce platform offering OTC hearing aids alongside vitamins, supplements, and (planned) durable medical equipment for the 55+ demographic.

title: Launches iHEAR Matrix OTC Hearing Aids in 4,218 Walmart stores nationwide
summary: iHEAR Matrix Rechargeable over-the-counter hearing aids placed in Walmart's nationwide over-the-counter hearing aid display.

title: Launches retail Shareholder Perks Program with TiiCKER
summary: Tiered perks program; qualifying shareholders receive premium discounts on iHEAR Matrix rechargeable hearing aids.

title: Retains SmallCapVoice.com to amplify investor relations and digital marketing
summary: Engagement to expand IR communications and digital reach.

title: Launches iHEAR brand of OTC hearing aids on CVS.com
summary: iHEAR-branded OTC hearing aids made available on CVS.com.

title: Posts 2021 Annual Report
summary: Annual report posted to OTC Markets disclosure portal.

title: Launches HearingAssist products on RiteAid.com
summary: HearingAssist OTC line added to RiteAid's e-commerce catalog.

title: Completes acquisition of Hearing Assist
summary: Closes the acquisition of Hearing Assist II LLC, adding the HearingAssist direct-to-consumer hearing aid brand and its Walmart in-store display footprint across more than 750 stores.

title: Letter of Intent to acquire Hearing Assist II LLC
summary: Announces LOI for 100% equity acquisition with expected close November 15, 2021.

title: Acquires iHEAR Medical
summary: Asset purchase brings the iHEARtest at-home hearing screener, the TReO personal sound amplifier, and the iHEAR teleaudiology and remote-fitting platform.

title: Retains Skyline Corporate Communications Group for IR
summary: Engages Skyline to manage investor relations and corporate communications.
